checklist: Analyze git history for recent changes

keyFindings.hypothesis_1_prompt_contamination: REFUTED - constraint only in main agent prompt
keyFindings.hypothesis_2_timeout_error_non_persisten: SUPPORTED - ok path has unhandled rejection risk
keyFindings.hypothesis_3_fallback_unreliable: UNPROVEN - idempotency ok, but cant recover from partial main-path success
keyFindings.hypothesis_5_lock_ttl: SUPPORTED - secondary risk from uncleared locks on ok-path failure

primaryRootCause: finalizeRun is fire-and-forget with no retry; if reapBySession throws on status='ok' path, error is unhandled and user_empathy data is lost
nextStageRecommendations: Add try/catch around reapBySession in status='ok' path of finalizeRun
Set observedAt even when reapBySession fails
Verify expectsCompletionMessage actually triggers subagent_ended hook
Consider forced event log flush after empathy events
